review_title: Stay Informed with NewsData.io
description: Despite some cons, it is important to note that NewsData.io still offers a highly valuable and reliable news experience. These suggestions are areas for improvement that, if addressed, would further elevate the platform's functionality and user satisfaction, particularly for professionals in fields such as DevOps who value seamless integration and customization options.
author: Andrew S.
pros: I have been using NewsData.io for about 12 months now, and I am very impressed with the service. NewsData.io stands out from the rest with its exceptional features and developer-friendly interface. One of the standout features of NewsData.io is its powerful search functionality. The search bar allows me to quickly find articles on specific topics or from particular sources. The accurate and fast search results have saved me valuable time when researching specific subjects or following up on ongoing stories.
cons: Improving the accuracy and consistency of categorization would greatly enhance the user experience by enabling more precise filtering and search functionalities.

review_title: Now getting Worldwide news in finger tips is easy
description: This API help us in various field of our business like, market research, latest updates, build brand reputation, to know our competitors branding and marketing strategies, to know the market sentiments especially on a specific period of time and least but not last to minimizing risk.
author: Asma B.
pros: It is possible to extract relevant/structured data/news from various sources is easy and quick. The extracted data can be download in various format like CSV, XLSX format. We can also extract news about various industry or company publication, Government amendments, policies, rules etc which is published on the internet. Extracted data is helpful to make decision fast and take corrective action. It is easy to use no complex process involved in it.
cons: It is difficult to extract all desired news from API, there is a small chances of loosing some news from the internet. Not possible to extract certain news published/stored on archive.There is no such control or parameter on extracting bias news and later it is difficult to analyse or extract unbiased news from bias news, and again it is time consuming task.

review_title: Data Intelligence at Your Fingertips - NewsData.io
description: Overall, NewsData.io is a great choice for those looking for easy-to-use data intelligence. The platform is intuitive and provides reliable, up-to-date information. While the lack of customization options and inability to save searches can be a downside, these features are not necessary for most users.
author: Svend Bertil F.
pros: NewsData.io offers an easy-to-use platform for data intelligence. The user interface is intuitive and allows for quick access to news stories, trending topics, and more. With its powerful search engine, users can quickly and easily find the information they need. The data is up-to-date and reliable, making NewsData.io a great choice for those seeking real-time data intelligence.
cons: One potential negative side of NewsData.io is the lack of customization options. While the platform is easy to use and powerful, it lacks the ability to customize the data according to specific needs. Additionally, there is no way to save searches or track user activity, making NewsData.io slightly less useful for more advanced data intelligence needs.

review_title: A Comprehensive Data Collection and Analysis Solution
description: Overall, NewsData.io is a great data collection and analysis tool. It provides a comprehensive suite of data sources, powerful analytics tools, and an intuitive user interface. The cost is a bit high, but it is worth the investment for those who need a comprehensive data collection and analysis solution.
author: Christian W.
pros: NewsData.io is a great data collection and analysis tool. It provides a wide range of data sources, from public data repositories to real-time data streams, allowing users to quickly and easily access the data they need. The user interface is intuitive and easy to use, making it quick and simple to search for and analyze the data. The analytics tools are powerful and provide detailed insights into the data.
cons: The only downside to NewsData.io is the cost. It is expensive compared to other data collection and analysis tools, and not all users will be able to afford it. Additionally, there are some features that are still in development and not available yet.

review_title: Efficient Data Solutions with NewsData.io
description: I have been very pleased with my experience using NewsData.io. I find that the platform is efficient, making it a great resource for data analysis. The only downside I have noticed is the limited size and scope of certain datasets, as well as the premium pricing of certain datasets.
author: Zhimin S.
pros: I've found NewsData.io to be a user-friendly and efficient platform for obtaining quality data. The extensive collection of datasets and the ability to quickly and easily access the data I need makes the platform an invaluable resource for my work.
cons: While I have found NewsData.io to be an invaluable tool for my data analysis, I have noticed that certain datasets can be a bit limited in terms of size and scope.

review_title: Superb Data Solutions with NewsData.io
description: Overall, NewsData.io has been an invaluable resource for our business. The customer service is fantastic, the datasets are comprehensive and reliable, and it's easy to access the data we need. However, the pricing can be a bit steep, and the navigation of the platform can be confusing.
author: Noam B.
pros: NewsData.io has been an incredibly valuable asset for our business. It provides us with easy access to reliable and comprehensive datasets that make our research and analysis much more efficient and accurate. The customer service has also been top-notch; they are always available to answer our questions and provide helpful solutions.
cons: While NewsData.io is a great resource, the pricing can be a bit steep for some. Also, the platform can be a bit confusing to navigate at times.

author: Batuhan S.
pros: It is a great data tool that connects to many places from one place.
cons: I did not experience any adverse situation.

review_title: Make research easy with Research Newsdata.io
description: Newsdata is easy to use news analytics tool. It helped me gather news from all major news websites from India and worldwide. The subscription plan comes at an affordable price but it costed high price when it comes to historical data beyond 6 months.
author: Nitin S.
pros: Analysis feature in Dashboard and Breaking News API are by far the best features in newsdata.io. Analysis helped me know the top language of news, daily basis news count and top domain name etc. Breaking news API helped me to get breaking news in real-time. 50 news articles per API credit is worth it. Documentation also helped me understand how to use the tool.
cons: I was finding the cost of historical news data on the website but it was not available there. To know the price of historical news data, I had to send an email to website. It will good if the price is mentioned on website. Also, no subscription plan comes with historical news data with more than past 6 months.

review_title: Maximising business opportunities with Newsdata.io's insights.
description: My experience with Newsdata.io is very positive till date. It is total game-changer. By using their market research tools, I'm able to get a leg up on the competition and spot emerging trends and opportunities before anyone else does.
author: Vijendr W.
pros: I can totally count on Newsdata.io to keep me in the loop! This platform is awesome because it lets me track content based on my keywords from a ton of different sites. And if I'm not sure if I've got the right stuff, their API Playground is a lifesaver. It helps me test my queries so I can find the content I need pronto. And their support team is super quick to respond and always on top of things.
cons: Sometimes when you use Newsdata.io, you might notice that one news source seems to show up more often than others in top headlines. This can be a bit of a bummer if you're looking for a variety of articles and perspectives to read.To make things more fair and interesting, it would be awesome if this platform could add a feature where the sources for the top headlines are randomised. That way, you'd get a mix of articles from different sources and get to see more diverse set of headlines every time you visit the site.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Newsdata.io is a sophisticated and comprehensive platform for analysing news data.Newsdata.io collects data from various sources, including social media platforms, news websites, and other online sources, to provide a comprehensive perspective of news data.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Newsdata.io is an exciting platform that offers a strong and complete approach to analyse real-time news data. Newsdata.io is a helpful tool for journalists, scholars, and anybody interested in collecting and analysing news data, thanks to its customisable dashboards, diverse data sources, and advanced analytics capabilities.
cons: The pricing may not be appropriate for some people, such as myself, who have limited finances or are just starting out in their jobs. Newsdata.io has a variety of subscription plans, which vary in price depending on the level of access and features requested.

pros: I like that it is a great way to stay up-to-date on the latest news and information. the product is very easy to use. It is designed to be user-friendly and intuitive. The process is straightforward and requires little to no training. The features that have the most impact are the ease of use and the ability to integrate with existing business processes.
cons: Some features that could be improved with the News API include making it easier to find specific articles or news stories, and providing more customization options for users. Additionally, the integration with existing business processes could be made simpler.

review_title: Powerfull toolkit
description: NewsData.io is a great option for gathering news data. It provides access to a wide range of news sources from around the world and offers a variety of data formats and features that make it easy to work with. It also has a powerful search engine that allows you to easily filter and find the news data you need. Additionally, the platform provides access to a vast range of topics, giving users access to a wide array of sources. Furthermore, the platform is highly secure and reliable, ensuring that your data is safe and accessible when you need it.
author: Michael N.
pros: NewsData.io is a data analytics platform that provides access to a range of news and media data. The platform combines multiple data sources to provide users with a comprehensive view of news and media coverage, allowing them to explore stories, topics, and trends in real-time. It provides data-driven insights and analysis, allowing users to identify and track key topics, trends, and stories across print, broadcast, and digital media. The platform also offers access to news archives and provides customizable dashboards for tracking, monitoring, and analyzing news and media coverage.
cons: I would like to say that I am generally satisfied. I think the ease of use it provides and the price it offers are quite reasonable.

review_title: Unlocking Unparalleled Insights with NewsData.io
description: Using NewsData.io has been a powerful tool for us to gain insights that are otherwise difficult to uncover. Although it does come with a hefty price tag, the quality of the data along with the ease of use makes it well worth the cost. Highly recommend for anyone looking for unparalleled insights from news sources.
author: Jusa S.
pros: It has been a game changer in terms of unlocking valuable insights from news sources. The ability to access data from over 10,000 sources, across different countries and languages, has enabled us to identify trends and insights that would have been otherwise difficult to uncover. The quality of the data is also great - up to date, comprehensive and accurate.
cons: One of the downsides is the cost of accessing the data, which can be quite pricey. However, if you are able to dedicate the resources, the insights you can uncover make it well worth the cost.

review_title: Unlock the Power of NewsData.io
description: Overall, I was very impressed with NewsData.io's features and capabilities. It made it easy to quickly find the news data I was looking for and provided me with a range of options for how to display and analyze the data. The cost may be a bit high, but the value it provides more than makes up for it.

pros: NewsData.io is a powerful web-based tool that makes it easy to access and analyze news data. With its intuitive UI and fast loading times, I was able to quickly find the information I needed. The filters and sorting options make it easy to find relevant data, and the ability to export data in various formats makes it even more useful.
cons: The only downside I found with NewsData.io is the cost. It's not the cheapest option out there, but it's worth it for the features it offers.
